goal: Introduce a side-effect-free card-conditioned dispatch planner that can bind a WLP contract draft to explicit AICOS/card references and decide whether dispatch may proceed, must remain review-only, or is blocked. The block must not integrate with runtime worker dispatch, server routes, providers, GitHub writes, or frontend.
scope_out: Do not call AICOS, maya-core, GitHub, providers, database, or runtime server.
Do not integrate the planner into orchestrateTask or live dispatch.
Do not infer card references from prose; only explicit requested card IDs may condition dispatch.
Do not add frontend UI in this block.
claims: A WLP contract draft can be combined with explicit card references into a deterministic dispatch plan.
Missing, deprecated, blocked, or path-incompatible cards prevent automatic dispatch.
Review-only cards downgrade the plan to review_required without blocking evidence preservation.
The planner is side-effect-free and tested without live external systems.
assumptions: Card-conditioned dispatch is a pre-runtime decision surface, not live worker dispatch.
AICOS/card lookup remains external/read-only and supplies explicit card snapshots to this adapter.
dod: builder/src/cardConditionedDispatch.ts exports side-effect-free planner types and functions.
The planner returns allow, review_required, or blocked with deterministic reasons.
The planner records card evidence snapshots without mutating the WLP contract draft.
builder/tests/cardConditionedDispatch.test.ts covers allow, missing card, blocked card, deprecated card, review-only card, and path mismatch.
review-packets/BPK-004.md records scope, safety invariants, gates, and verification.
The focused cardConditionedDispatch test and npm run typecheck in builder/ pass.
stop_conditions: Live AICOS, maya-core, GitHub, provider, database, or server calls become necessary.
Card references need to be inferred from prose.
prior_task_findings: BPK-003 created a pure WorkerPacket-to-WLP adapter. BPK-004 should add card-conditioned planning as another pure boundary, not wire it into live dispatch.
